summary: SoSoValue, a Web3 crypto investment platform offering AI-driven research, comprehensive project data, and experience points (EXP) for user engagement, saw community discussions on airdrops, platform features like unified research pages, and integrations such as MAG7.SSI index tracking, with Japanese community @SosovalueJP assisting users on EXP unstaking post-120% verification. Sodex, the high-performance order-book DEX on ValueChain L1 by SoSoValue, announced and completed a mainnet upgrade, launched stock perpetuals trading (e.g., $PLTR, $CRCL up to 10x leverage with analyst insights), and got listed on CoinGecko for spot and futures, boosting transparency and visibility. SSI refers to SoSoValue's smart indexes like MAG7.SSI and ssiMAG7, enabling multi-asset exposure in one token; recent mentions highlighted price drops (e.g., ssiMAG7 at $12.86, -3.79% 24h, -29.89% 1Y) amid broader crypto news shared via SoSoValue links, positioning it as an easy growth capture tool.
